name: Fyber
description: In-app advertising platform for developers with FairBid mediation, offerwall, and video monetization.

seo.title: Fyber — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Fyber: In-app advertising platform for developers with FairBid mediation, offerwall, and video monetization.

when_to_use: In-app bidding via FairBid mediation for mobile game monetization
Offerwall and rewarded video monetization SDK for free-to-play games
Maximizing eCPM through unified auction across multiple demand sources
Video and display ad monetization via Fyber SDK for mobile publishers

pros: Strong offerwall and rewarded video history
cons: UI hasn't kept pace with MAX or LevelPlay
Support quality varies by account tier
review.verdict: Legacy mediation with decent tech, but Digital Turbine integration uncertainty gives pause.
review.best_for: Existing Fyber customers and publishers already using Digital Turbine's DT Exchange.
review.not_for: New publishers evaluating mediation in 2026, MAX or LevelPlay are better bets.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
